calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-01-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie Victoire, CSR: Susan Lee, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Petitioner: Christina Arzadon and Homer M. Arzadon, present in pro per, were sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name of minor to: Gabriel R. Arzadon
Decree signed in open court.
